_doc: Allowlist for yarn audit high/critical advisories that cannot be fixed in the current branch. Every entry needs a reason and a review date. See SUPPLY-CHAIN-SECURITY.md.
_keep_when_empty: Do NOT delete this file when entries[] is empty. The empty file is the running assertion of 'audit gate exists AND zero current debt' — it pre-paves the schema for the next suppression, preserves git history of past suppressions, keeps the CODEOWNERS-routed surface, and lets the cross-repo tracker distinguish 'clean gate' (count=0) from 'wrapper pattern not in use' (no file at all). Burn down ENTRIES; keep the FILE.

_fields.id: npm advisory numeric ID (from `yarn audit --json` advisory.id) — REQUIRED
_fields.ghsa: GitHub Security Advisory ID — for humans, not used for matching
_fields.reason: why allowlisted — upstream has no fix, reachable code path mitigation, etc.
_fields.review: YYYY-MM-DD by which the entry must be re-evaluated — REQUIRED

entries.reason: Inherited libvips CVEs in sharp <0.35.0, pulled via @vercel/og which pins sharp ^0.34 — no upstream fix path yet. Sharp runs server-side only, for OG image generation on trusted inputs. Remove once @vercel/og ships sharp >=0.35 or a resolutions bump is validated.
